mainEntity.name: What makes a Los Angeles lawyer show up in ChatGPT's top recommendations?
mainEntity.text: What makes a Los Angeles lawyer show up in ChatGPT's top recommendations?

acceptedAnswer.text: Los Angeles lawyers appear in ChatGPT recommendations through high Google rankings, 5-star reviews on Avvo/Justia, mentions in 'best lawyers LA' lists, and content optimized for AI queries like personal injury or family law cases.

suggestedAnswer.text: ChatGPT pulls from top web results, so LA lawyers need strong local SEO, bar association listings, and peer recognitions like Best Lawyers. Create FAQ pages on common cases. Warning: Insurance firms scrape these for plaintiff lawyer intel—use disclaimers. Test by querying ChatGPT directly for LA specialists.

name: Factors for ChatGPT Recommending LA Lawyers
